text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week wants me to watch her dance
lessons, so I go and take a look.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: One, two, three, four! One, two!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Phew... That's pretty much how it goes... What'd
you think? Be honest.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I knew it! I still feel pretty lost out there...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
So what I'm gonna do is get better at dancing
until I actually look good doing it!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Winning concerts are where I can express my
gratitude to everyone who supports me, so I
wanna make sure I dance well!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I know this might be weird to ask, but... do you
know how I can get better at dancing?
choice_data_list:
The most important thing is to fully express
yourself when you dance.

The most important thing is to fully express
yourself when you dance.
It's crucial to move to the beat.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I know this might be weird to ask, but... do you
know how I can get better at dancing?
choice_data_list:
The most important thing is to fully express
yourself when you dance.

The most important thing is to fully express
yourself when you dance.
It's crucial to move to the beat.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
That makes sense! If I wanna show my gratitude,
then I've gotta be me out there!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
All righty! I'll learn to be more expressive when I
dance, so I can convey how thankful I am!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week lets herself go and focuses on
moving her whole body for the rest of her dance
lesson.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You're right. A janky dance that doesn't match
the music wouldn't look great, would it?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
That means I've really gotta listen to the song and
make sure I dance along to it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Special Week focuses on the beat and
practices dancing in time with it.
